## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and updates across multiple client accounts and projects.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several accounts (Outreach, Okta, Monograph, Metronome) showing positive progress with unblocked workflows and content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Airbyte facing challenges with manual article adjustments; need to balance automation and targeted improvements](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Augment Code at critical juncture; awaiting SoW signature to continue engagement and resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates and Progress

  - [**Outreach**: Weekly sync scheduled; product deep dive pending. Aida handling artifacts due to Jo's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Okta**: Clear direction established. Generating various artifacts, including industry-specific ones. Sample account research to demonstrate capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Sentinel-1**: Deep dive rescheduled. Awaiting update on CVE database from dev team.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Monograph**: Weekly sync today. Imogen setup complete. Aiming to publish first blog this week, with four more blogs in progress. Note: 6-week sprint, transitioning to Panzer in two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Metronome**: Unblocked on design front. Early access page publishing this week. First drafts delivery this week, aiming for Monday completion for setup and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [**Interwell**: PSEO pipeline unblocked. Jess testing workflow, aiming to start publishing today.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [**Airbyte**: Manual adjustments needed for 200 refreshed articles. Targeting 25-40 adjustments daily. Challenges with re-running refreshed articles through the system.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Hypergrowth & Biologica**: Meetings scheduled for today. New blog and social posts created for Hypergrowth. Biologica interested in using workflow for internal content fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**Town**: Meeting today. Daryl working on content, dashboard setup complete.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
  - [**Engine**: 8 pieces published this week, pod producing more content. Green light for refreshes without client involvement. Meeting tomorrow to discuss content quality and new product release.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### Strategic Discussions

  - [**Reporting Focus**: Shift from quantity-based updates to more comprehensive reporting, including deltas in clicks, impressions, and overall impact of published/refreshed pages.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [**Learning and Adaptation**: Emphasize weekly learnings from previous content cohorts to refine strategy and demonstrate value beyond content production.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Communication Channels**: Utilize Slack for sharing graphs, stats, and progress updates to better showcase value to executives and potential new stakeholders.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

### Augment Code Situation

  - [Redesigned newsletter, guides published, MCP pages live.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Producing 20 more articles, but awaiting SoW signature for $15,000/month engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Critical decision point: need confirmation on moving forward with four lanes or reallocating resources.](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)

## Next Steps

  - Resolve SEMrush account access issues for Outreach team (Marcel addressing)
  - Schedule transition meeting with Panzer for Monograph handover
  - [Set up sync with Chris Kent (Metronome) for Marcel to catch up](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Continue manual adjustments for Airbyte articles while exploring ways to optimize workflow](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Prepare comprehensive updates for Engine, focusing on overall impact and learnings](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Push for Augment Code SoW signature in upcoming meeting, clarify engagement direction](https://fathom.video/share/BP98BqNCyY2CVP2TYHMmnhD2FXRRbyQD?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
